desc: Leveraging large language models to develop an AI-powered tag recommendation system for news articles, deployed via AWS Lambda and integrated into custom WordPress plugins to support high-volume editorial workflows.

Led a 40+ person team across engineering, data, and design to build and maintain a high-traffic news website serving 6M+ annual page views, delivering interactive features and redesigned digital products using React, Next.js, and Python.

Developed ML-based nucleus detection models for the IncuCyte live cell analysis platform, benchmarked AI inference pipelines, and modernized cross-platform software architecture across multiple internal projects.
Mentored 30+ students in UX design and accessibility by leading discussion, conducting weekly office hours and answering questions on Slack to support their semester-long coding projects.

Built and led development of cross-platform applications, implemented and scaled Duo 2FA authentication impacting 100,000+ users, and developed AI-driven identity verification solutions within IAM systems.
